message:
feat(fwc): add credential store, event filtering, and operation replay modules (CUAL-C.1, C.2, D.2, H.1, H.2)

New modules: credential.rs (72 tests) — backend-pluggable credential store
with auth verify, events.rs (86 tests) — comprehensive event filtering engine
with type/field/exclude/chain filters, replay.rs (73 tests) — operation replay
from history with input override and TTL-based expiry. Also fixes pre-existing
clippy warnings in event_stream.rs and dead_code warnings for pipeline/events
dispatch functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
